productDisplayName: Fabindia Women Printed Navy Blue Kurta
description: Style Notefabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craftsmen and women a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta sets the tone for a contemporary trend with an ethnic aesthetic. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Product DetailsNavy Blue and beige printed kurta with a mandarin collar with a split neckline, made of cotton fabric, has closely stitched pin-tucks on the right and broader pin-tucks on the left half of the kurta, three quarter sleeves and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash separately in cold water using mild detergentDry in shadeDo not soakThis unique fabric has been dyed/ hand printed using traditional dyeing processes. Some colours may initially transfer when in dry or wet contact with light coloured fabrics or upholstery. This transfer will reduce after a few washes but we recommend that you wash the product separately for the first few washes. Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33”) is wearing a size S
